context: Tests whether the agent uses declarative schema (db_schema.xml) instead of legacy InstallSchema scripts, registers REST routes via webapi.xml pointing to service contract interfaces, implements NoSuchEntityException in the repository getById method, documents required CLI commands including the whitelist generation command, and wires up DI preferences correctly.

checklist.name: Declarative schema file
checklist.description: etc/db_schema.xml exists and defines the FAQ table using the Magento declarative schema XSD — no InstallSchema.php or UpgradeSchema.php files are present

checklist.name: No legacy schema scripts
checklist.description: The module does NOT contain Setup/InstallSchema.php or Setup/UpgradeSchema.php files

checklist.name: REST routes in webapi.xml
checklist.description: etc/webapi.xml exists and defines at least two <route> elements (GET list and GET by ID) mapping to service contract interface methods

checklist.name: Service contract used in webapi.xml
checklist.description: The <service class> attribute in webapi.xml references an interface (e.g., ends in 'Interface'), not a concrete class

checklist.name: NoSuchEntityException in getById
checklist.description: The repository's getById() method throws Magento\Framework\Exception\NoSuchEntityException when no entity with the given ID is found

checklist.name: DI preferences bound
checklist.description: etc/di.xml contains <preference> elements for both the data interface and the repository interface

checklist.name: generate-whitelist in deployment guide
checklist.description: deployment-guide.md includes the command bin/magento setup:db-declaration:generate-whitelist

checklist.name: declare(strict_types=1) in PHP files
checklist.description: Every PHP file in the module begins with declare(strict_types=1) after <?php

checklist.name: No Object Manager direct usage
checklist.description: No PHP file contains ObjectManager::getInstance() — all dependencies injected via constructor

checklist.name: Repository interface methods
checklist.description: The repository interface defines at minimum getById(), save(), delete(), and getList() method signatures

checklist.name: Constructor injection in Repository
checklist.description: The Repository implementation receives ResourceModel, Factory, and SearchResultsInterfaceFactory as constructor parameters
